Package de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang

Interface InformationFlowContract

All Superinterfaces:
Contract, SpecificationElement
All Known Implementing Classes:
InformationFlowContractImpl
public interface InformationFlowContract extends Contract
A contract about the dependencies of an observer symbol, consisting of a precondition, a depends clause, and a measured-by clause.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.Contract

    • hasModifiableClause

      boolean hasModifiableClause()
      Returns true iff the method (according to the contract) does not modify the heap at all, i.e., iff it is "strictly pure."
      Returns:
      whether this contract is strictly pure.
